strengths: 20+ years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, demonstrating broad technical depth
Direct AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling experience (MCP, code generators) in current role at re:cinq, aligning with AI strategy focus
Founder experience with GISCollective, an open-source event-driven platform, showing entrepreneurial initiative and product development skills
concerns: No demonstrated AI expertise in products/platforms built (resume lacks examples of AI-powered solutions or ML systems delivered)
No advanced degree in AI-related field (only BS in CS), despite role preference for PhD/Master's in AI
Lacks explicit experience advising customers/partners on AI technologies or cloud product strategy (key responsibility)
response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum experience requirement (15+ years) and has relevant AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, but lacks concrete evidence of building AI-powered products/platforms or advising on AI technologies (key responsibilities). The absence of an advanced AI degree and direct AI product experience significantly weakens their fit despite strong general engineering credentials.
